item.title: 💰 Negotiating a 10% raise now can boost your lifetime earnings by over $500K. Aim high, but stay realistic to maximize your potential. 🎯 #ScalePilot #SocialPilot #AIAutomations
item.description: 💰 Negotiating a 10% raise now can boost your lifetime earnings by over $500K. Aim high, but stay realistic to maximize your potential. 🎯 #ScalePilot #SocialPilot #AIAutomations
